title: 100g White Shredded Tissue Paper for Gift Boxes Decoration, Empty Gift Box Filling Paper, Filler Paper for Valentine's Day, Christmas, Birthday Gift Decorations, DIY Gift Packaging
features: 【Package Quantity】about 100g gift box shredded tissue paper, which are enough quantity for you to use. Natural shade of white, perfect for Valentine's Day, Birthday, Halloween Christmas gift decorations.
【Material】Shredded paper Made from 2-3mm wide lightweight paper, eco-friendly and non-toxic, very light, can be used to protect the glass and fragile items.
【Wide Use】This white shredded tissue paper can be used on birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Valentines, New Years or other occasions
【Warm Tips】Each pack of cut paper is packed in a vacuum. Keep the shredded tissue paper away from heat or fire. Not recommended for children under the age of Five. Please use under adult supervision.
【High Quality Service】We aim to provide 100% customer satisfaction to our customers. Please contact us if there is any problems, we provide a full-refund or hassle-free replacement service.
